# Market Canvas AI

> Free, plain-English investing education + Sharia-compliant (halal) stock screening for the Pakistan Stock Exchange (PSX) and US markets. Beginner-first, real examples, a picture for every idea.

## Topic hubs
- [Investing Basics](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/investing-basics/): Start here. What a share is, how the market works, and how to begin.
- [Fundamental Analysis](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/fundamental-analysis/): Is a company worth its price? Read the numbers in plain English.
- [Technical Analysis](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/technical-analysis/): Read charts, trends, and indicators, written for absolute beginners.
- [Halal Investing](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/halal-investing/): What makes a stock Sharia-compliant, and how to invest the halal way.
- [Investing Books](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/investing-books/): Timeless lessons from the world's best investing books, in plain English.
- [Personal Finance](https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/learn/personal-finance/): Budgeting, saving, debt, and growing your money. The foundations everyone needs.

## About
Sharia screening follows AAOIFI-style rules via the KMI All-Share Index. Markets: PSX + US. Educational, not financial advice. More: https://learn.marketcanvasai.com/about/
